summary.summary: Addresses a mutable-state race in BaseAPSManager around bolus progress reporting. The PR initially introduced a private actor BolusProgressState that owned the DoseProgressReporter reference and a generation token to serialize add/remove observer operations and to gate a delayed nil-send (see commit aa39571ab9e3 and the PR description). After PR feedback the actor approach was removed and the final change serializes all bolus-reporter reads/writes onto the existing processQueue: bolusReporter was restored as a processQueue-guarded variable, cancelBolus was moved to run on processQueue, the bolusTrigger sink now invokes create/clear reporter on processQueue, and doseProgressReporterDidUpdate calls clearBolusReporter on the same queue (see commit 3b064ecf6916, the diff, and the merged PR commit). The branch was merged (commit 5ee0f432d5a1).
summary.userFacingImpact: Intended to remove a race condition in APSManager's bolus progress reporting and make reporter lifecycle mutations serialized. The change is internal to APSManager's concurrency handling; no API surface additions are shown in the supplied sources. Because the implementation approach changed during the PR (actor introduced then removed in favour of dispatching onto processQueue), a human reviewer is recommended to validate the final concurrency model and runtime behaviour in the target environment (see pr:gordolio/Trio#1227, commit:aa39571ab9e3, commit:3b064ecf6916).
